title: Single Sheet of Plywood Workbench
summary: This is the perfect first workbench to build as it requires only two tools and can be made with only one sheet of plywood
description: This is the perfect first workbench to build as it requires only two tools and can be made with only one sheet of plywood

materials.name: Box of 1 1/4" Kreg pocket-hole screws (see tools list)

steps.title: Watch the video
steps.body: Before attempting this project, watch the full youtube video to get a better understanding of how to complete the project.

steps.title: Cut plywood pieces
steps.body: Cut pieces down according to the cutlist

steps.title: Assemble Legs
steps.body: Using screws or pocket holes, join the two different leg pieces together to create 4 legs

steps.title: Assemble shelf brackets
steps.body: Using screws or pocket holes, assembled the two shelf brackets with the short and long stretchers

steps.title: Attach top bracket
steps.body: Using screws, attach the top bracket to two of the legs

steps.title: Attach bottom shelf
steps.body: Using screws, attach the bottom shelf bracket approximately 10” from the bottom of the legs

steps.title: Attach other legs
steps.body: Using screws, attach the rest of the legs

steps.title: Attach bench top
steps.body: Using screws, attach the workbench top and you are done!
